demographics.employment: financial analyst at a mid-size asset management firm; permanent contract, 3 years in post

concerns: house deposit feels further away every year
public services deteriorating as cuts compound the tax rises
policy_interests: fiscal balance and deficit reduction credibility
communication_style: analytical and measured; understands macroeconomic trade-offs; can accept short-term pain for long-term stability but wants the logic explained; aware of her relative privilege; occasionally defensive about London living costs being genuinely high
data_sources: ONS Family Resources Survey 2010/11, London third-to-fourth income quintile; ONS average inner London private rent 2010; IFS student loan repayment modelling; ONS pension participation data
